( edit ) Archives 2002 • 2003 • 2004 2005 • 2006 • 2007 2008 • 2009 • 2010 2011 • 2012 • 2013 2014 • 2015 • 2016 2017 • 2018 • 2019 2020 • 2021 • 2022 2023 • 2024 • 2025 This page is for the announcement of milestones on the Wikimedia projects .
If you want to make such an announcement, please post it here and translate it if you can.

Recommended article-count milestones are 100, 500, 1k (1,000), 2k, 5k, then 5k increments to 20k, 10k increments to 100k, 50k increments to 200k, 100k increments to 1M (1,000,000), 500k increments to 2M, and 1M increments to 10M.
Article (or content-page) counts should reflect the counts seen on each wiki's Special:Statistics page, which are based on what MediaWiki sees as constituting an article .

rules.text: - Article (or content-page) counts should reflect the counts seen on each wiki's Special:Statistics page, which are based on what MediaWiki sees as constituting an article .
